flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rowan College at Burlington County rose 48% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.7k → $7.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rowan College at Burlington County rose 38% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.9k → $9.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Rowan College at Burlington County fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (70.3% → 58.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rowan College at Burlington County fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).
